en: to intend, i.e. be about to be, do, or suffer something (of persons or things, especially events; in the sense of purpose, duty, necessity, probability, possibility, or hesitation)
kjv: about, after that, be (almost), (that which is, things, + which was for) to come, intend, was to (be), mean, mind, be at the point, (be) ready, + return, shall (begin), (which, that) should (after, afterwards, hereafter) tarry, which was for, will, would, be yet

en: to be of interest to, i.e. to concern (only third person singular present indicative used impersonally, it matters)
properly, indicative of affirmation or concession (in fact); usually followed by a contrasted clause with G1161 (δέ) (this one, the former, etc.)
kjv: even, indeed, so, some, truly, verily

en: to stay (in a given place, state, relation or expectancy)
kjv: abide, continue, dwell, endure, be present, remain, stand, tarry (for), X thine own

en: to part, i.e. (literally) to apportion, bestow, share, or (figuratively) to disunite, differ
kjv: deal, be difference between, distribute, divide, give participle

en: solicitude
a division or share (literally or figuratively, in a wide application)
kjv: behalf, course, coast, craft, particular (+ -ly), part (+ -ly), piece, portion, respect, side, some sort(-what)

en: midnight (especially as a watch)
middle (as an adjective or (neuter) noun)
kjv: among, X before them, between, + forth, mid(-day, -night), midst, way

en: properly, denoting accompaniment; "amid" (local or causal); modified variously according to the case (genitive association, or accusative succession) with which it is joined; occupying an intermediate position between G575 (ἀπό) or G1537 (ἐκ) and G1519 (εἰς) or G4314 (πρός); less intimate than G1722 (ἐν) and less close than G4862 (σύν))
kjv: after(-ward), X that he again, against, among, X and, + follow, hence, hereafter, in, of, (up-)on, + our, X and setting, since, (un-)to, + together, when, with (+ -out)

en: to transform (literally or figuratively, "metamorphose")
to think differently or afterwards, i.e. reconsider (morally, feel compunction)
(subjectively) compunction (for guilt, including reformation); by implication, reversal (of (another's) decision)
to measure (i.e. ascertain in size by a fixed standard); by implication, to admeasure (i.e. allot by rule)
a measure ("metre"), literally or figuratively; by implication, a limited portion (degree)
as far as, i.e. up to a certain point (as a preposition, of extent (denoting the terminus, whereas G891 (ἄχρι) refers especially to the space of time or place intervening) or conjunction)
(adverb) not, (conjunction) lest; also (as an interrogative implying a negative answer (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expects an affirmative one)) whether
kjv: any but (that), X forbear, + God forbid, + lack, lest, neither, never, no (X wise in), none, nor, (can-)not, nothing, that not, un(-taken), without

en: but not, not even; in a continued negation, nor
kjv: neither, nor (yet), (no) not (once, so much as)

en: not even one (man, woman, thing)
kjv: any (man, thing), no (man), none, not (at all, any man, a whit), nothing, + without delay

en: no further
kjv: any longer, (not) henceforth, hereafter, no henceforward (longer, more, soon), not any more

en: to lengthen, i.e. (middle voice) to enlarge
not ever; also if (or lest) ever (or perhaps)
kjv: if peradventure, lest (at any time, haply), not at all, whether or not

en: not too, i.e. (in continued negation) neither or nor; also, not even
a "mother" (literally or figuratively, immediate or remote)
whether at all
kjv: not (the particle usually not expressed, except by the form of the question)

en: small (in size, quantity, number or (figuratively) dignity)
to detest (especially to persecute); by extension, to love less
pay for service (literally or figuratively), good or bad
a wage-worker (good or bad)
a memorial, i.e. sepulchral monument (burial-place)
a remembrance, i.e. cenotaph (place of interment)
to exercise memory, i.e. recollect; by implication, to punish; also to rehearse
a reminder (memorandum), i.e. record
hardly talking, i.e. dumb (tongue-tied)
kjv: having an impediment in his speech

en: a modius, i.e. certain measure for things dry (the quantity or the utensil)
an adulteress (literally or figuratively)
(middle voice) to commit adultery
adultery
to commit adultery
merely
remaining, i.e. sole or single; by implication, mere
one-eyed
shape; figuratively, nature
a "mill", i.e. (by implication), a grinder (millstone)
to apply (perfumed) unguent to
"myrrh", i.e. (by implication) perfumed oil
a secret or "mystery" (through the idea of silence imposed by initiation into religious rites)
Moseus, Moses, or Mouses (i.e. Mosheh), the Hebrew lawgiver
Nazareth or Nazaret, a place in Palestine
a Nazarene, i.e. inhabitant of Nazareth
yes

en: a fane, shrine, temple
"nard"
a youth (under forty)
dead (literally or figuratively; also as noun)
"new", i.e. (of persons) youthful, or (of things) fresh; figuratively, regenerate
newness, i.e. youthfulness
properly, cloudiness, i.e. (concretely) a cloud
to abstain from food (religiously)
not eating, i.e. abstinent from food (religiously)
to cleanse (especially the hands or the feet or the face); ceremonially, to perform ablution
to exercise the mind (observe), i.e. (figuratively) to comprehend, heed
a malady (rarely figuratively, of moral disability)
in a mind-having way, i.e. prudently
a bride-groom (literally or figuratively)
the bridal room
"now" (as adverb of date, a transition or emphasis); also as noun or adjective present or immediate
kjv: henceforth, + hereafter, of late, soon, present, this (time)

en: "night" (literally or figuratively)

by implication, (of friction) to boil or heat); a vessel (as fashioned or for cooking) (or perhaps by corruption from the Latin sextarius, the sixth of a modius, i.e. about a pint), i.e. (specially), a measure for liquids or solids, (by analogy, a pitcher)
to desiccate; by implication, to shrivel, to mature
kjv: dry up, pine away, be ripe, wither (away)

en: arid; by implication, shrunken, earth (as opposed to water)
timber (as fuel or material); by implication, a stick, club or tree or other wooden article or substance
the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)
kjv: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc

en: a road; by implication, a progress (the route, act or distance); figuratively, a mode or means
a "tooth"
properly, residence (abstractly), but usually (concretely) an abode (literally or figuratively); by implication, a family (especially domestics)
the head of a family
kjv: goodman (of the house), householder, master of the house

architecture, i.e. (concretely) a structure; figuratively, confirmation
a dwelling (more or less extensive, literal or figurative); by implication, a family (more or less related, literally or figuratively)
"wine" (literally or figuratively)
such or what sort of (as a correlation or exclamation); especially the neuter (adverbially) with negative, not so
kjv: so (as), such as, what (manner of), which
